use_cases: Searchable dropdown with async data fetching and debounced queries
Multi-select input for tags, categories, or filter values
Grouped option selection with icons and metadata hints
Custom option creation directly from user input
Virtualized long lists for performance optimization
ai_summary: A feature-rich combobox component with async query support, debounced search, custom option creation, multi-select capability, option grouping, and virtualization for large datasets. Supports custom rendering, clearable input, and integrates with form controls. Designed for developer tooling and SaaS applications requiring advanced selection UI.
